settings.heading: Self-serve resources, toolkits and practical business documents
settings.text: Use Essentials when you need templates, checklists, guides, toolkits or prepared resources that help you move without starting with a full service engagement.

settings.heading: Choose the practical resource format
settings.text: Some resources are digital or template-based, while others include prepared delivery, deployment options or onboarding requirements.

settings.title: Business templates
settings.text: Document templates and packs for common business, legal, commercial and operating tasks.

settings.title: Operational toolkits
settings.text: Practical packs with forms, checklists, registers and implementation options.

settings.title: Supported implementation options
settings.text: Use on-demand services when the resource needs review, configuration or business-specific setup.

settings.heading: Know what kind of fulfilment you are buying
settings.text: Essentials should be clear about whether an item is instant, prepared, deployed or requires onboarding.

settings.title: Self-serve support
settings.text: Use templates and toolkits when you need a practical starting point and can adapt the output yourself.

settings.title: Prepared delivery
settings.text: Some resources are made to order or require onboarding before the final document or pack is delivered.

settings.title: Deployed options
settings.text: Toolkit variants may include deployment support, setup help or a higher-touch implementation pathway.

settings.title: Popular supported service options
settings.description: Browse practical services when a template or toolkit is not enough and the work needs review, setup or delivery support.

settings.heading: Essentials questions
settings.text: Use these answers to set expectations before checkout or enquiry.

settings.question: Are all resources instant downloads?
settings.answer: No. Some products are instant or digital, while others are made to order, prepared after onboarding, or available in deployed service variants. Check the product page before purchase.

settings.question: Can resources be tailored?
settings.answer: Some products include deployed, plus or premium options where additional support may be available. If the product does not clearly fit, contact support before purchase.

settings.question: What if I am not sure which resource is right?
settings.answer: Start with Support or Advisory if the business issue needs a decision before you buy a resource.

settings.heading: Start with the resource that matches the work
settings.text: Use Essentials for practical documents, toolkits and supported resources before requesting broader implementation help.
